channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Tigers OF Parker Meadows to IL with broken arm, concussion - ESPN
item.description:

item.title: xAI sues Colorado over first state AI anti-discrimination law - Financial Times
item.description:

item.title: California coffee chain faces backlash after pledge to remove Pride flags - The Guardian
item.description:
1. California coffee chain faces backlash after pledge to remove Pride flags  The Guardian
  2. Philz Coffee to remove Pride flags from all locations  KTVU
